# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report vulnerabilities either submit a private report using the ***Report a vulnerability*** button on the [Security](https://github.com/keldor-dev/Keldor/security "Keldor Security") page or publicly by opening an issue on the [Issues](https://github.com/keldor-dev/Keldor/issues "Keldor Issues") page. Both options require you to have a GitHub account.
